Off Calendar May-29-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants To 1) Compel Responses By Each Plaintiff To Defendants Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents, Set One, And Production Without Objection 2) Compel Responses By Each Plaintiff To Defendants First Set Of Special Interrogatories Without Objection 3) Compel Responses By Each Plaintiff To Form Interrogatories - General (Set One) Without Objection 4) Deem Admitted By Each Plaintiff Requests For Admissions (Set One), And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-22-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS EUGENYA VESTEL, PETER VESTEL, NICK VESTEL'S MOTION TO 1) COMPEL RESPONSES BY EACH PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANTS DEMAND FOR IDENTIFICATION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, AND PRODUCTION WITHOUT OBJECTION 2) COMPEL RESPONSES BY EACH PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANTS FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES WITHOUT OBJECTION 3) COMPEL RESPONSES BY EACH PLAINTIFF TO FORM INTERROGATORIES - GENERAL (SET ONE) WITHOUT OBJECTION 4) DEEM ADMITTED BY EACH PLAINTIFF REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS (SET ONE), AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS

Appearances: Daniel Bornstein of Bornstein Law (415.409.7611) appearing for defendants and moving parties; Andrew Dimitriou (no card provided) appearing for opposing party.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. Admissions are deemed admitted. Complete verified responses without objections to be served within 20 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,600. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
